title: CPAP Order Status — Acceptable Handling
scenario: Customer asks about a delayed CPAP order. Agent answers correctly but does not go the extra mile.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Hi, I ordered a CPAP machine a few weeks ago and I haven't gotten it yet.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Okay, what's your name and date of birth?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Let me check... yeah, it looks like we're still waiting on insurance authorization.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: How long does that usually take?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: It varies. Usually a couple more weeks. You'll get a call when it ships.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Okay, I guess I'll just wait then.
